title: My Cat Is Fat
excerpt: Dr. Patel said obese. I cried in the parking lot. Here's the year-long journey to get Mochi back to a healthy weight.
author: A person who cried in a vet parking lot and then fixed it

title: Raising Gus
excerpt: I got a puppy in 2022. July, I think. He's 4 now. Here's what I'd do differently.
author: An IT guy who got a puppy on impulse and spent two years googling at 2 AM

title: Gus Got an Ear Infection and I Panicked for No Reason
excerpt: Gus woke me up scratching at 6 AM. It smelled sour. I panicked. It was yeast. Here's what I learned.
author: Someone who panicked at 6 AM over dog ear yeast
